buttons.primary: bg-[#CCFF00] text-black hover:bg-[#B3E600] font-bold rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 hover:scale-105 uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.secondary: bg-transparent border border-[#333333] text-white hover:border-[#CCFF00] hover:text-[#CCFF00] rounded-full px-8 py-4 transition-all duration-300 uppercase tracking-wide
buttons.ghost: text-[#A1A1A1] hover:text-white transition-colors uppercase tracking-widest text-sm

cards.service: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#333333] hover:border-[#CCFF00]/50 transition-all duration-500 p-8 group relative overflow-hidden
cards.pricing: bg-[#1A1A1A] border border-[#333333] p-8 flex flex-col h-full hover:shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(204,255,0,0.1)] transition-all duration-300
cards.pricing_featured: bg-[#1A1A1A] border-2 border-[#CCFF00] p-8 flex flex-col h-full relative shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(204,255,0,0.2)]

content.title: PROFESIONALIZA TU CARRERA MUSICAL
content.subtitle: Producción, distribución y estrategia para artistas que van en serio.

about.title: QUIÉNES SOMOS
about.description: Somos Lumo Entretenimiento, una agencia integral dedicada a potenciar el talento musical. No solo producimos música; construimos carreras. Desde la primera nota en el estudio hasta la estrategia de lanzamiento global, somos tu socio estratégico.

items.title: Producción Musical
items.desc: Grabación, mezcla y masterización con estándares de industria.

items.title: Distribución Digital
items.desc: Lleva tu música a Spotify, Apple Music y todas las plataformas globales.

items.title: Marketing Musical
items.desc: Estrategias de lanzamiento, redes sociales y crecimiento de audiencia.

items.title: Desarrollo Artístico
items.desc: Branding, imagen y coaching para definir tu identidad única.

infrastructure.title: INFRAESTRUCTURA DE CLASE MUNDIAL
infrastructure.subtitle: Alianza con Buffalo Azul Studios
infrastructure.description: Acceso exclusivo a instalaciones de primer nivel. Salas tratadas acústicamente, equipo analógico y digital de vanguardia para que tu sonido compita con los grandes.

instructions_to_main_agent: Use 'Archivo Black' from Google Fonts for all headings. If not available, use a heavy weight of 'Montserrat'.
Implement the Hero section with the provided video URL as a background. Ensure a dark overlay (bg-black/60) so text is readable.
Use the Neon Green (#CCFF00) sparingly. Only for buttons, active states, and key borders. Do not overuse.
The 'Services' section should use a Bento Grid layout (CSS Grid) with hover effects on cards.
Ensure the 'Contact' form connects to the backend endpoint '/api/contact'.
Use Lucide-React icons for all iconography.
Strictly follow the Dark Mode theme. Backgrounds should be #0A0A0A or #1A1A1A.
For the 'Pricing' section, make the middle card (Profesional) pop with a Neon Green border and glow effect.
Add 'data-testid' to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
universal_guidelines: Avoid generic centered layouts. Use asymmetry where possible.
Use 2-3x more padding than standard Tailwind defaults (e.g., py-24 instead of py-12).
Micro-interactions are mandatory: hover states for buttons, cards, and links.
No gradients for text or backgrounds unless specified. Stick to solid, bold colors.
